reviews.comment:

Excellent service, very friendly, and the staff helped us with tourist information.

reviews.comment:
Rompen mucho las pel...tas para cargar nafta a las motos. Lo demas todo bien.

reviews.comment:
Atención poco esmerada. Hacen Factura A Único lugar pars tomar un café. Hay WiFi. Buen combustible. ACÁ

Service is subpar. They issue invoices. Only place to get coffee. There's Wi-Fi. Good fuel. HERE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de parte de los empleados. Deficiente el servicio de tecnología que ofrece. Siempre se quedan sin sistema o les pasa algo.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service from the employees. The technology service they offer is poor. They're always down or something's wrong with their system.
